ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "af" INTEGER /* Number of air frost days */,
  "rain" REAL /* Total rainfall in millimeters */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., manual entry, automated sensor) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting weather data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "last_data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather model */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the weather model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the weather model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather model used for the prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the prediction is made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the prediction */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the prediction */,
  "predicted_tmax" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_tmin" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_af" INTEGER /* Predicted number of air frost days */,
  "predicted_rain" REAL /* Predicted total rainfall in millimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Score indicating the accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id")
)
